positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~born_multiple(luke)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(luke)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~spends_time_with_siblings(luke)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~born_multiple(X0) | spends_time_with_siblings(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~spends_time_with_siblings(X0) | lives_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(X0) | ~lives_at_home(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define has_siblings_born_together(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define complains_about_siblings(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
